all.critique:
Below is my plain‐text critique of the analysis:

1. Noise Injection Details (Medium):
 The description of how diffusion noise is injected is a bit vague. The analysis notes that a DDPM-inspired noise schedule is used and that a diffusion timestep t is determined, but it doesn’t clearly specify how t is sampled or how exactly the noise is applied to the latent tokens. Because this is a central part of the diffusion model’s functioning, more precise details would help ensure that the noise inject
